title: RiMC: Beta Legacy
description: A beta-themed vanilla+ modpack for RiMC SMP, with a focus on player creativity instead of progression.
body:
---

![RiMC Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fc69ac1c5bac4bf878f52154cf09bd1bf8b3970.webp)

---

_Note: This modpack is made for RiMC: Beta Legacy SMP. However, you are free to use it by yourself if you'd like._

> **For the best experience, you can [join our Discord server](https://discord.gg/n9KwnnxP) and become a member of our SMP! We are looking forward to meeting you.**

---

![A header that says "What is this?"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5581ad74752bbd1c07a8c13cbd78caa481f99437_0.webp)

---
This is a 1.21.1 Fabric modpack that has most of the modern features stripped out. This means the stability and convenience of modern Minecraft, combined with the serene simplicity of the days gone by. I've also carefully selected some vanilla+ mods to maximize player creativity and foster social interactions. Voice chat, painting, programming, music making, photography, more redstone: that's just some of the things you can look forward to. Think of it like an **alternative history version of minecraft**, where instead of focusing on progression and adventure, the developers focused on chill vibes and player creativity.

![Notable Additions List](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af2135a0ca9b2c943bf6f64f99c8bfe55048dd0d.png)
